modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to update Microsoft Office on Mac from 2011 version.

full_description_text:  
User has Microsoft Office 2011 on Mac.  
They want to upgrade to a newer version.  
This is for macOS environment.  
No specific version mentioned for the update.
